item.title: I tried Steal A Brainrot on the Meta Horizon app and it was AWESOME! Think you can get better Brainrots then me? Download the Meta Horizon app now and try it out for free! Link in bio. #MetaHorizonPartner @Meta Horizon #StealABrainrot

item.title: There's a few songs and sounds that brain rot have changed in my brain. I don't necessarily mind personally because it makes me chuckle whenever it happens and I need all the laughs I can get #chaotic #music #brainrot
